summary: List Specification Areas for a Project
description: This endpoint returns a paginated list of Specification Areas for a Project.

data.description: List of bulk published drawing sets for a given project

created_at.description: Date and time when the Specification Area was created

description.description: Specification Area Description as free form text

divisions_count.description: Number of unique Specification Section Divisions of Specification Sections in the Specification Area

sections_count.description: Number of Specification Sections in the Specification Area

updated_at.description: Date and time when the Specification Area was last updated

403.description: User does not have right permissions
